THE MILLSTONE WARRENS - page 2

3. SLUICE GATE. Green water sluices through a rusted
grate below the walkway. 120 gp in a tarred satchel
hang beneath it. Stairs descend to the undermill.

LEVEL 2

1. UNDERMILL POOL. A cold pool fills half the cavern;
two pale lights bob over the water.

MILL WISP. AC 7 [12], HD 2*, hp 9, MV fly 120' (40'),
ATT 1 chill touch (1d4 + special), THAC0 17, ML 10,
AL Chaotic, NA 1d4 (1d6). Harmed only by silver or
magical weapons.

2. RAT KING'S COURT. Bones and grain husks carpet a
throne of broken millstones. The rat king holds court
here, wearing a silver crown worth 400 gp.
